creator: vezhlys@gmail.com
text:
There're few typos in ixgbe_api.c source code comments:
line 1357 >> * that same register.  It can be a problem as some of the feilds may
feilds -> fields
Next line >>  * for valid reasons change inbetween the time wrote the register and
inbetween -> in-between

line 1372 >> *  ixgbe_bypass_set - Set a bypass field in the FW CTRL Regiter.
Regiter -> Register
